Compare.Description: Compares the component with the second

ToString.Description: Converts the component into a plain string

Italics.Description: Sets whether this Component should use italics or not

ClickEvent.Description: Prepares the Click Event of the Component in the chat. The available types are url, command, suggestcommand

Colorize.Description: A helper function to colorize functions that return uncolored Components/MiniMessage even though they should be colored
